hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && if [ ! -d node_modules ]; then echo 'ProxLink: installing dependencies…'; npm install --no-audit --no-fund >/tmp/proxlink-npm-install.log 2>&1 && echo 'ProxLink: dependencies ready (npm run typecheck | test | lint | build).' || echo 'ProxLink: npm install failed — see /tmp/proxlink-npm-install.log'; else echo 'ProxLink: node_modules present.'; fi
